meaning: n.[绮剧鍒嗘瀽]璇讳功鐤楁硶(浠ヨ涔︿负杈呭姪鐨勬不鐤楁硶)
examples: Conclusion the bibliotherapy is an effective adjutant method of rehabilitation for patients with depression.
Methods study the questionnaires results of 99 psychiatric inpatient and find the influencing factor on bibliotherapy.
On the psychological basis of cognitive therapy theory, identity theory, and narrative theory, bibliotherapy goes through at least three stages: identification, catharsis, insight.
